mapper.sql: id, user_id, weekly_budget_id, threshold, current_budget, spent_money, ratio, is_read, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, weekly_budget_id, threshold, current_budget, spent_money, ratio) VALUES (#{userId}, #{weeklyBudgetId}, #{threshold}, #{currentBudget}, #{spentMoney}, #{ratio})
